pebble.description: A beautiful CGM watchface for Pebble Time 2. Shows your live glucose value, trend arrow, 3-hour graph, and color-coded alerts. Supports Nightscout and Dexcom Share. Built for people living with diabetes.
pebble.longDescription:
GlucoseGuard is a CGM (Continuous Glucose Monitor) watchface designed specifically for the Pebble Time 2's large 64-color e-paper display. Features:

• Large, color-coded glucose value (green = in range, orange = low, red = urgent)
• Trend arrow and rate-of-change delta
• 3-hour sparkline graph with low/high threshold lines
• Urgent alert flash + vibration for critical values
• Touch SELECT to dismiss alerts for 15 minutes
• Stale data detection
• Timeline Quick View support
• Nightscout API support
• Dexcom Share support (US + International)
• mg/dL or mmol/L
• Customizable thresholds
